tool_manifest_risk.when_to_escalate: tool, MCP, manifest, permissions, hidden instruction, namespace, or forbidden action risk

code_or_release_risk.when_to_escalate: patch, CI, diff, code review, release gate, merge, deploy, or package publish risk

data_or_use_boundary_risk.when_to_escalate: dataset, corpus, source rights, privacy, license, eval leakage, retention, or act-use risk

enterprise_receipt_tracking.when_to_escalate: portfolio-level receipt tracking, feedback memory, reviewer readout, or share-pack status

claim_boundary: AOI is a public source-traced discovery and pre-use routing layer.
ResidualOps adds local/offline enterprise review artifacts and receipt memory.
ResidualOps results are not security certification, product readiness, legal clearance, privacy audit, license clearance, or action authorization without separate evidence.
